name: Masters Azalea Cocktail
author: alexmorgan
description: Sip on this vibrant pink Masters Azalea Cocktail, a refreshing and easy-to-make drink perfect for spring gatherings or celebrating the Masters golf tournament. Made with vodka, lemon, pineapple, and a splash of grenadine.

step_sections.name: Instructions
steps: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add vodka, fresh lemon juice, pineapple juice, and grenadine to the shaker.
Shake well until thoroughly chilled, about 15-20 seconds.
Strain the mixture into a chilled cocktail glass.
Garnish with a lemon slice and a cherry, if desired.
